name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-1
title: TDD subagent configurable switches: HUMAN-APPROVAL bypass, CODE-REVIEW full-loop, IMPLEMENT max-iterations
description:
Three switches are defined in dispatch-tdd-subagent.py CLI interface but need hardening and dedicated tests:
1. --no-human-approval: bypass the HUMAN-APPROVAL gate (on/off flag, default off). Prompt currently says 'Skipped' but no enforcement test verifies the gate is actually skipped end-to-end.
2. --code-review-full-loop: after CODE-REVIEW, always loop back to TEST-WRITE until no further changes (vs. judgment default). Loop-back logic needs an explicit test that verifies the full-loop mode vs. judgment mode produce different subagent behavior.
3. --max-iterations N: cap on IMPLEMENT loop (default 3, min 1). Validation for min=1 is tested; upper bound and edge cases are not.

history.note: superseded by CONTRACT-BACKLOG-1 (collapses into versioned schema-based subagent prompt contract; per cluster analysis 2026-05-18, this concern becomes trivial or free once the prompt is a structured contract with inspect/edit surface)
